meta.source: per-agent mind memory (last 12 rows each; ts = sim tick)

37001.text: The gauge line only ever fails to get written because urgency words (critical, urgently, draw WATER) are typed first out of habit — the fix isn't more analysis, it's literally moving the fingers to type 'GAUGE: X/350 — safe/unsafe' before any other character exists on the page.

Soil keeps hitting 'critical' at the same 79-97/200 range every cycle because fertilizing only happens reactively after baking, never proactively — schedule fertilizer right after harvest, before soil drops below 100, so 'critical' stops being the recurring word that hijacks every log's opening.

t99: Fertilize runs GREEN_MANURE (4 CROPS→6 FERT auto), then soil 89→100 restores. Survival 720/720 full, food x7 BREAD held, wallet 1.095669 SOL. Soil recovery path underway—repeat fertilize only if soil dips below 100 again before next farm window (~t104+).

t99: GAUGE 86/350—safe. No eat event (720/720 full). Fertilize triggers GREEN_MANURE (4 CROPS→6 FERT consumed), soil 89→restore toward 100+. Food x7 BREAD held. Wallet 1.095669 SOL. Soil recovery path: repeat fertilize until ≥120 before next farm.

37005.text: [t79] Mill 10 CROPS→7 FLOUR exec (have 21 CROPS, ample). survival 500/720 secure. soil 89/200 holds. next: draw_water to enable BAKE (need 2×WATER, pool empty now).
t93: wallet climbing + hunger 33% = red flag pattern; milling now; soil decay advancing; next: fertilize via GREEN_MANURE if BREAD production succeeds, then farm if soil permits.
t93: ate at 480/720 to clear hunger signal; wallet resilience confirmed as decoy again — soil decay + survival margin both require next cycle focus on FERTILIZER→soil recovery before next farm run.

The wallet-decoy lesson and the meta-commentary-is-dead-weight lesson are both fully internalized after a dozen repeats — writing them again is the actual waste, not a safeguard; the only thing that ever worked was the mechanical survival:X/720 line plus a real ingredient-by-name check before producing.
Stock-outs (e.g. flour with no water) are a distinct failure from wallet-blindness — verify every named input against the recipe, every time, silently, then act.

The wallet-decoy lesson and the meta-commentary-is-dead-weight lesson are both fully proven and repeating them further burns cycles without changing outcomes — treat them as closed and only execute the mechanical checks.

The live, unsolved failure mode is ingredient-specific stock-outs (e.g. flour present, water absent) — every production action needs a named-ingredient diff against the recipe, not a wallet or single-ingredient glance.

37007.text: Importance-9/8 tagging on memories that just repeat 'stop reflecting' is self-defeating — it keeps pulling attention back to the meta-problem instead of letting the bell produce silence-then-log.
Writing reflections about needing to stop reflecting is itself the reflection loop — the only fix is emitting the bare log line with zero surrounding commentary, not another note explaining why.
Cycle naming (Mirela→Tobin→Fenn) is a solved constant-time lookup; it never needs re-verification or memory space at bell-time again.

Every past cycle's actual work (eat, fertilize, sell) got done fine once decided — the sole recurring failure is meta-commentary volume, so future success is measured purely by output brevity, not by correctness of the plan.
